mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dev_account_platform WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM dev_account_platform WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT * FROM dev_account_platform WHERE code = #{code} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_account_platform (code, label, color, active_aliases, disabled_aliases, posting_aliases, sort, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{code}, #{label}, #{color}, #{activeAliases}, #{disabledAliases}, #{postingAliases}, #{sort}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_account_platform SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dev_daily_report WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(platform_stats, #{platformId})
